title: rubus incretatus
intro: Rubus incretatus, also known as the 'unverified thimbleberry,' is a lesser-known species within the Rubus genus. However, I have found that there is a Rubus species known as the thimbleberry or Rubus parviflorus. This plant has been reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Rubus parviflorus can be used to create teas and infusions for various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and alleviating digestive issues.
